TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Marengreng == Masaselal atu marengreng Kalu niyaru nu Pangcah, ira 'amin ku marengreng hananay a lisin. Urasa, adihay ku caayay kalecad a kakawau nu lisin. U inian nisuwalan anini, u nu Natauran a niyaru' a kakawau: U ngangan nu selal – siwa a saselalan. Anu nau maan a kaput ku nisaselalan nu misu, tangasa i nikapatay nu tireng, a caay pacelul tu ngangan nu selal. Ma'edem a pitu a mihca malingatu aca tu sakaruma a liyut nu selal a marengreng. Milecinuwasay atu misatataday: Sa'yaway a nikala mamiselal, naw milecinuwasay tu marengrengay a tamdaw, u mangalaay a malapapeluway nu nia selal. A caay henay pakadungdung a sidemak tu nu selal a tamdaw. Uruma hantu, ira ku demak nu lalabu nu luma', anu miselal, amaanen henay a mipadang tu demak nu luma'. U sananay sisa, milecinuwas tu nikarengreng nuini a kaput. U suwal tu matiniay a tamdaw u misataday han ku nipangangan. Anu satada suwalen, u sa'ayaway a ma'ala nu inian a selal, u mamiselal han ku nipangangan. Anu tangasatu i pituay a mihca, i ayaw nu cacay a mihca nu pilisinan, caay kanca pi'ala tu mamiselal a tamdaw. Anu mi'ala tu mamiselal, u matilaay u namilecinuwas a tamdaw, anu aluman sabawtusa. Alamaanan walu a tatamdawan ku nipapicumud. Sakatusa a nipi'ala tu miselalay, u tangasaay nu mihca a kapah a wawaan. U mihmihcaan i pilisinan haen sa a mitakus tu tamdaw, tangsa ini karengrengan a mihecaan ku nisatukur . Tangasa tu i karengrengan a mihcaan, ma'dem ku pitu'ay a mihcaan, silalamlam sa ku tamdaw anu aluman. Walu a pulu' siwa a pulu' ira ku rabas ku mikihatiyaay a kapah i matia a mihca. Urasa, acaay kanca ka similecinuwasay i karengrengan. Anini satu, caaytu ka aluman ku mikihatiyaay a misaselal. Mahrek a milisin i sakamuktep a remi'ad, a malingatu tuway a semamsam a pakasaw tu mamarengreng a selal. U kakawau hantu nu nipakasaw iri. Sa'yaway a muk'tep a remi'ad - cacay a kaysing ku nipiluwan a keman tu ranam tu lahuk tu labi. Sakatusa a muk'tep a remi'ad - tusa a kaysin ku nipiluwan tu ni kakeman. Sakatulu a muk'tep a remi'ad - hani ka cacayen tu kakeman. U a'am satu atu nanum, ini kaw kalingatuwan a semamsam. U dabak atu sangsangdeb, i uma'umahan, i taluan a minanam a malalikid, palecalecad tu kuku' tu kamay a misakeru, u radiw ku ruma. Anu cima ku caayay pitengil a tamdaw, ta'eseng nu misatataday, u nikasibuduy ku ruma a melawan. Alama'anan minanam a marengreng misatatirebudan ku ruma, cacay a saselalan awaay ku misiwatiday tu kuput. Salikulay a muk'tep a remi'ad - milaup i amis, u emin nu selal a milalaba tu ayam, kuliyul. Awaay ku nikapetan tu lakaw tu maamaan aca, walsay sa. Anu mapatay ku nilepelan iri, u sara'ecusay a kakawau. Aranikay a mapatay kia tamdaw naw makalepelay sa ku suwal nu matuasay. Mahrek satu taluma', palecapuen kia nilepelan, sipabeli i matuasay sa tuduhen sipakaen tu papeluway. Tuwa mibetik pakarumud tu suwal. Sapaka tulu a remiad, milaup aca itimul, anu awaay ku mapatayai nu nilepelan niya selal iri, uruma ku ulah nu selal, nu matuasay, u malemeday sa ku suwal nu niyaru'. Uruma hantu, ira u mabanaay a papelu a tamdaw tatulu, sasepat tuwa mahkulung a tayra i paleluway a matuasat, mitengil minanam tu sapapelu, mipalita aca tu sasadademakan nu selal. Alamaanan pakasemuwalen nu matuasay, papinanam a papelu. Itini inika semamsam a remi'ad, u dabak, sangsangdeb caay kanca pinanam a misakeru, mabekac, remadiw papelu awaay ku misiwatiday. Tuwa tangasatu i sakatulu a pulu' ira ku siwa a remi'ad, pahanhan. Mirasur tu mamisanga' tu sasalusidan nu tireng. Tuwa tangsatu tu labi i muktepay a tuki, malecapu tu i kakilumaan i makawali a luma'. Anini a labi a malecapu ku mamarengreng a selal, a sewalen nu matuasay pasebanaen tu sasademaken nu marengrengay. Maherek a suwal ku matuasay iri, maru' satu 'amin ku selal tangasa i nikalingad. I kalingadan a dabak, i hararbaran masilsil tu i putal maitala tu palingaday nu papeluway a matuasay. U mamarengrengay hantu a selal, sisatamec 'amin tu busuk sirenget tu papah nu daydam u nisalalapian, mikapet 'amin tu tayu u kakemkeman anu mabekac, anu tu'eman ku mipimelaw. Tuwasaan, initu ku papeluway, palekal a palingatu tu selal a mabekac. U makalikul hantu a tamdaw, u papakarusay tu salikulay a mabekacay, Mikapet tu tukal u diwas, u buhcalay a ma'inayan mihakulung tu selal a mabekac, makalepel tu salikulay a tamdaw, mikemkem tu daidam micupelas tu kulul mikuduc tu banuh nu ayam sipabulsak i kulul nia salikulay. "sakilmelen kapah! tanglalay niama aku han, kasamata!" sa a paceruh . U pakarusay hantu a tamdaw masakilmel a mipadang, maykitin maycekeruh, sulinay tangasatu i kakatangasaan. Saan, masasa'tu 'amin ku namabekacay, satu misuayaw tu cidal a malalikid, lima a raradiwan a misakeru. Tangasa i sabau cacay ku tuki kia misengar , ruyaruy satu 'amin a taluma' a malahuk i luma'. I namalahuk, paremiad satu a malalikid tangasa i sabaw cacay a tuki nu labii a misengar a misakeru. Malecapu aca a mitengil tu suwal nu matuasay, pasebana' tu sademakan nu selal, tuwa hatini tu ku demak tu nu marengrengay a kakawau. Ngangan nu selal: Alabangas : 14-21 a mihcaan (na i 2008 a miselal,saka telucay nu selal anini) Matabuk : 22-29 Ma'urad : 30-37 Ma'ulac : 38-45 Ma'uway : 46-53 Alemet : 54-61 Raraw : 62-69 Alamay : 70-77 Aladiwas : 78-85
S.PHON: == marəŋrəŋ == masasəɾaɾ ato~u~u marəŋrəŋ kaɾo~u~u nijaro~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ, ira ʡamin ko~u~u marəŋrəŋ ħananaj a ɾisin. o~u~urasa, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u ʦaajaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ a kakawao~u~u no~u~u ɾisin. o~u~u inian niso~u~uwaɾan anini, o~u~u no~u~u natao~u~uran a nijaro~u~uʡ a kakawao~u~u: o~u~u ŋaŋan no~u~u səɾaɾ * siwa a sasəɾaɾan. ano~u~u nao~u~u maan a kapo~u~ut ko~u~u nisasəɾaɾan no~u~u miso~u~u, taŋasa i nikapataj no~u~u tirəŋ, a ʦaaj paʦəɾo~u~uɾ to~u~u ŋaŋan no~u~u səɾaɾ. maʡəɬ~ɮəm a pito~u~u a miħʦa maɾiŋato~u~u aʦa to~u~u sakaro~u~uma a ɾijo~u~ut no~u~u səɾaɾ a marəŋrəŋ. miɾəʦino~u~uwasaj ato~u~u misatataɬ~ɮaj: saʡjawaj a nikaɾa mamisəɾaɾ, naw miɾəʦino~u~uwasaj to~u~u marəŋrəŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u~u maŋaɾaaj a maɾapapəɾo~u~uwaj no~u~u nia səɾaɾ. a ʦaaj ħənaj pakaɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ a siɬ~ɮəmak to~u~u no~u~u səɾaɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u~uro~u~uma ħanto~u~u, ira ko~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, ano~u~u misəɾaɾ, amaanən ħənaj a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. o~u~u sananaj sisa, miɾəʦino~u~uwas to~u~u nikarəŋrəŋ no~u~uini a kapo~u~ut. o~u~u so~u~uwaɾ to~u~u matiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u~u misataɬ~ɮaj ħan ko~u~u nipaŋaŋan. ano~u~u sataɬ~ɮa so~u~uwaɾən, o~u~u saʡajawaj a maʡaɾa no~u~u inian a səɾaɾ, o~u~u mamisəɾaɾ ħan ko~u~u nipaŋaŋan. ano~u~u taŋasato~u~u i pito~u~uaj a miħʦa, i ajaw no~u~u ʦaʦaj a miħʦa no~u~u piɾisinan, ʦaaj kanʦa piʡaɾa to~u~u mamisəɾaɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u~u miʡaɾa to~u~u mamisəɾaɾ, o~u~u matiɾaaj o~u~u namiɾəʦino~u~uwas a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u~u aɾo~u~uman sab~b~vawto~u~usa. aɾamaanan waɾo~u~u a tatamɬ~ɮawan ko~u~u nipapiʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ. sakato~u~usa a nipiʡaɾa to~u~u misəɾaɾaj, o~u~u taŋasaaj no~u~u miħʦa a kapaħ a wawaan. o~u~u miħmiħʦaan i piɾisinan ħaən sa a mitako~u~us to~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taŋsa ini karəŋrəŋan a miħəʦaan ko~u~u nisato~u~uko~u~ur . taŋasa to~u~u i karəŋrəŋan a miħʦaan, maʡɬ~ɮəm ko~u~u pito~u~uʡaj a miħʦaan, siɾaɾamɾam sa ko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ano~u~u aɾo~u~uman. waɾo~u~u a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ siwa a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u rab~b~vas ko~u~u mikiħatijaaj a kapaħ i matia a miħʦa. o~u~urasa, aʦaaj kanʦa ka simiɾəʦino~u~uwasaj i karəŋrəŋan. anini sato~u~u, ʦaajto~u~u ka aɾo~u~uman ko~u~u mikiħatijaaj a misasəɾaɾ. maħrək a miɾisin i sakamo~u~uktəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ, a maɾiŋato~u~u to~u~uwaj a səmamsam a pakasaw to~u~u mamarəŋrəŋ a səɾaɾ. o~u~u kakawao~u~u ħanto~u~u no~u~u nipakasaw iri. saʡjawaj a mo~u~ukʡtəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ - ʦaʦaj a kajsiŋ ko~u~u nipiɾo~u~uwan a kəman to~u~u ranam to~u~u ɾaħo~u~uk to~u~u ɾab~b~vi. sakato~u~usa a mo~u~ukʡtəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ - to~u~usa a kajsin ko~u~u nipiɾo~u~uwan to~u~u ni kakəman. sakato~u~uɾo~u~u a mo~u~ukʡtəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ - ħani ka ʦaʦajən to~u~u kakəman. o~u~u aʡam sato~u~u ato~u~u nano~u~um, ini kaw kaɾiŋato~u~uwan a səmamsam. o~u~u ɬ~ɮab~b~vak ato~u~u saŋsaŋɬ~ɮəb~b~v, i o~u~umaʡo~u~umaħan, i taɾo~u~uan a minanam a maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ, paɾəʦaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u~u ko~u~uko~u~uʡ to~u~u kamaj a misakəro~u~u, o~u~u raɬ~ɮiw ko~u~u ro~u~uma. ano~u~u ʦima ko~u~u ʦaajaj pitəŋiɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw, taʡəsəŋ no~u~u misatataɬ~ɮaj, o~u~u nikasib~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj ko~u~u ro~u~uma a məɾawan. aɾamaʡanan minanam a marəŋrəŋ misatatirəb~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮan ko~u~u ro~u~uma, ʦaʦaj a sasəɾaɾan awaaj ko~u~u misiwatiɬ~ɮaj to~u~u ko~u~upo~u~ut. saɾiko~u~uɾaj a mo~u~ukʡtəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ - miɾao~u~up i amis, o~u~u əmin no~u~u səɾaɾ a miɾaɾab~b~va to~u~u ajam, ko~u~uɾijo~u~uɾ. awaaj ko~u~u nikapətan to~u~u ɾakaw to~u~u maamaan aʦa, waɾsaj sa. ano~u~u mapataj ko~u~u niɾəpəɾan iri, o~u~u saraʡəʦo~u~usaj a kakawao~u~u. aranikaj a mapataj kia tamɬ~ɮaw naw makaɾəpəɾaj sa ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uasaj. maħrək sato~u~u taɾo~u~umaʡ, paɾəʦapo~u~uən kia niɾəpəɾan, sipab~b~vəɾi i mato~u~uasaj sa to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uħən sipakaən to~u~u papəɾo~u~uwaj. to~u~uwa mib~b~vətik pakaro~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ. sapaka to~u~uɾo~u~u a rəmiaɬ~ɮ, miɾao~u~up aʦa itimo~u~uɾ, ano~u~u awaaj ko~u~u mapatajai no~u~u niɾəpəɾan nija səɾaɾ iri, o~u~uro~u~uma ko~u~u o~u~uɾaħ no~u~u səɾaɾ, no~u~u mato~u~uasaj, o~u~u maɾəməɬ~ɮaj sa ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ. o~u~uro~u~uma ħanto~u~u, ira o~u~u mab~b~vanaaj a papəɾo~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw tato~u~uɾo~u~u, sasəpat to~u~uwa maħko~u~uɾo~u~uŋ a tajra i paɾəɾo~u~uwaj a mato~u~uasat, mitəŋiɾ minanam to~u~u sapapəɾo~u~u, mipaɾita aʦa to~u~u sasaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan no~u~u səɾaɾ. aɾamaanan pakasəmo~u~uwaɾən no~u~u mato~u~uasaj, papinanam a papəɾo~u~u. itini inika səmamsam a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u ɬ~ɮab~b~vak, saŋsaŋɬ~ɮəb~b~v ʦaaj kanʦa pinanam a misakəro~u~u, mab~b~vəkaʦ, rəmaɬ~ɮiw papəɾo~u~u awaaj ko~u~u misiwatiɬ~ɮaj. to~u~uwa taŋasato~u~u i sakato~u~uɾo~u~u a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u siwa a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ, paħanħan. miraso~u~ur to~u~u mamisaŋaʡ to~u~u sasaɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮan no~u~u tirəŋ. to~u~uwa taŋsato~u~u to~u~u ɾab~b~vi i mo~u~uktəpaj a to~u~uki, maɾəʦapo~u~u to~u~u i kakiɾo~u~umaan i makawaɾi a ɾo~u~umaʡ. anini a ɾab~b~vi a maɾəʦapo~u~u ko~u~u mamarəŋrəŋ a səɾaɾ, a səwaɾən no~u~u mato~u~uasaj pasəb~b~vanaən to~u~u sasaɬ~ɮəmakən no~u~u marəŋrəŋaj. maħərək a so~u~uwaɾ ko~u~u mato~u~uasaj iri, maro~u~uʡ sato~u~u ʡamin ko~u~u səɾaɾ taŋasa i nikaɾiŋaɬ~ɮ. i kaɾiŋaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮab~b~vak, i ħararb~b~varan masiɾsiɾ to~u~u i po~u~utaɾ maitaɾa to~u~u paɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj no~u~u papəɾo~u~uwaj a mato~u~uasaj. o~u~u mamarəŋrəŋaj ħanto~u~u a səɾaɾ, sisataməʦ ʡamin to~u~u b~b~vo~u~uso~u~uk sirəŋət to~u~u papaħ no~u~u ɬ~ɮajɬ~ɮam o~u~u nisaɾaɾapian, mikapət ʡamin to~u~u tajo~u~u o~u~u kakəmkəman ano~u~u mab~b~vəkaʦ, ano~u~u to~u~uʡəman ko~u~u mipiməɾaw. to~u~uwasaan, inito~u~u ko~u~u papəɾo~u~uwaj, paɾəkaɾ a paɾiŋato~u~u to~u~u səɾaɾ a mab~b~vəkaʦ. o~u~u makaɾiko~u~uɾ ħanto~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u~u papakaro~u~usaj to~u~u saɾiko~u~uɾaj a mab~b~vəkaʦaj, mikapət to~u~u to~u~ukaɾ o~u~u ɬ~ɮiwas, o~u~u b~b~vo~u~uħʦaɾaj a maʡinajan miħako~u~uɾo~u~uŋ to~u~u səɾaɾ a mab~b~vəkaʦ, makaɾəpəɾ to~u~u saɾiko~u~uɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, mikəmkəm to~u~u ɬ~ɮaiɬ~ɮam miʦo~u~upəɾas to~u~u ko~u~uɾo~u~uɾ miko~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uʦ to~u~u b~b~vano~u~uħ no~u~u ajam sipab~b~vo~u~uɾsak i ko~u~uɾo~u~uɾ nia saɾiko~u~uɾaj. "sakiɾməɾən kapaħ! taŋɾaɾaj niama ako~u~u ħan, kasamata!" sa a paʦəro~u~uħ . o~u~u pakaro~u~usaj ħanto~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw masakiɾməɾ a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ, majkitin majʦəkəro~u~uħ, so~u~uɾinaj taŋasato~u~u i kakataŋasaan. saan, masasaʡto~u~u ʡamin ko~u~u namab~b~vəkaʦaj, sato~u~u miso~u~uajaw to~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ, ɾima a raraɬ~ɮiwan a misakəro~u~u. taŋasa i sab~b~vao~u~u ʦaʦaj ko~u~u to~u~uki kia misəŋar , ro~u~ujaro~u~uj sato~u~u ʡamin a taɾo~u~umaʡ a maɾaħo~u~uk i ɾo~u~umaʡ. i namaɾaħo~u~uk, parəmiaɬ~ɮ sato~u~u a maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ taŋasa i sab~b~vaw ʦaʦaj a to~u~uki no~u~u ɾab~b~vii a misəŋar a misakəro~u~u. maɾəʦapo~u~u aʦa a mitəŋiɾ to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uasaj, pasəb~b~vanaʡ to~u~u saɬ~ɮəmakan no~u~u səɾaɾ, to~u~uwa ħatini to~u~u ko~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~u~u no~u~u marəŋrəŋaj a kakawao~u~u. ŋaŋan no~u~u səɾaɾ: aɾab~b~vaŋas : **-** a miħʦaan (na i **** a misəɾaɾ,saka təɾo~u~uʦaj no~u~u səɾaɾ anini) matab~b~vo~u~uk : **-** maʡo~u~uraɬ~ɮ : **-** maʡo~u~uɾaʦ : **-** maʡo~u~uwaj : **-** aɾəmət : **-** raraw : **-** aɾamaj : **-** aɾaɬ~ɮiwas : **-**
S.FORM: == Marengreng == Masaselal atu marengreng Kalu niyaru nu Pangcah, ira 'amin ku marengreng hananay a lisin. Urasa, adihay ku caayay kalecad a kakawau nu lisin. U inian nisuwalan anini, u nu Natauran a niyaru' a kakawau: U ngangan nu selal – siwa a saselalan. Anu nau maan a kaput ku nisaselalan nu misu, tangasa i nikapatay nu tireng, a caay pacelul tu ngangan nu selal. Ma'edem a pitu a mihca malingatu aca tu sakaruma a liyut nu selal a marengreng. Milecinuwasay atu misatataday: Sa'yaway a nikala mamiselal, naw milecinuwasay tu marengrengay a tamdaw, u mangalaay a malapapeluway nu nia selal. A caay henay pakadungdung a sidemak tu nu selal a tamdaw. Uruma hantu, ira ku demak nu lalabu nu luma', anu miselal, amaanen henay a mipadang tu demak nu luma'. U sananay sisa, milecinuwas tu nikarengreng nuini a kaput. U suwal tu matiniay a tamdaw u misataday han ku nipangangan. Anu satada suwalen, u sa'ayaway a ma'ala nu inian a selal, u mamiselal han ku nipangangan. Anu tangasatu i pituay a mihca, i ayaw nu cacay a mihca nu pilisinan, caay kanca pi'ala tu mamiselal a tamdaw. Anu mi'ala tu mamiselal, u matilaay u namilecinuwas a tamdaw, anu aluman sabawtusa. Alamaanan walu a tatamdawan ku nipapicumud. Sakatusa a nipi'ala tu miselalay, u tangasaay nu mihca a kapah a wawaan. U mihmihcaan i pilisinan haen sa a mitakus tu tamdaw, tangsa ini karengrengan a mihecaan ku nisatukur . Tangasa tu i karengrengan a mihcaan, ma'dem ku pitu'ay a mihcaan, silalamlam sa ku tamdaw anu aluman. Walu a pulu' siwa a pulu' ira ku rabas ku mikihatiyaay a kapah i matia a mihca. Urasa, acaay kanca ka similecinuwasay i karengrengan. Anini satu, caaytu ka aluman ku mikihatiyaay a misaselal. Mahrek a milisin i sakamuktep a remi'ad, a malingatu tuway a semamsam a pakasaw tu mamarengreng a selal. U kakawau hantu nu nipakasaw iri. Sa'yaway a muk'tep a remi'ad - cacay a kaysing ku nipiluwan a keman tu ranam tu lahuk tu labi. Sakatusa a muk'tep a remi'ad - tusa a kaysin ku nipiluwan tu ni kakeman. Sakatulu a muk'tep a remi'ad - hani ka cacayen tu kakeman. U a'am satu atu nanum, ini kaw kalingatuwan a semamsam. U dabak atu sangsangdeb, i uma'umahan, i taluan a minanam a malalikid, palecalecad tu kuku' tu kamay a misakeru, u radiw ku ruma. Anu cima ku caayay pitengil a tamdaw, ta'eseng nu misatataday, u nikasibuduy ku ruma a melawan. Alama'anan minanam a marengreng misatatirebudan ku ruma, cacay a saselalan awaay ku misiwatiday tu kuput. Salikulay a muk'tep a remi'ad - milaup i amis, u emin nu selal a milalaba tu ayam, kuliyul. Awaay ku nikapetan tu lakaw tu maamaan aca, walsay sa. Anu mapatay ku nilepelan iri, u sara'ecusay a kakawau. Aranikay a mapatay kia tamdaw naw makalepelay sa ku suwal nu matuasay. Mahrek satu taluma', palecapuen kia nilepelan, sipabeli i matuasay sa tuduhen sipakaen tu papeluway. Tuwa mibetik pakarumud tu suwal. Sapaka tulu a remiad, milaup aca itimul, anu awaay ku mapatayai nu nilepelan niya selal iri, uruma ku ulah nu selal, nu matuasay, u malemeday sa ku suwal nu niyaru'. Uruma hantu, ira u mabanaay a papelu a tamdaw tatulu, sasepat tuwa mahkulung a tayra i paleluway a matuasat, mitengil minanam tu sapapelu, mipalita aca tu sasadademakan nu selal. Alamaanan pakasemuwalen nu matuasay, papinanam a papelu. Itini inika semamsam a remi'ad, u dabak, sangsangdeb caay kanca pinanam a misakeru, mabekac, remadiw papelu awaay ku misiwatiday. Tuwa tangasatu i sakatulu a pulu' ira ku siwa a remi'ad, pahanhan. Mirasur tu mamisanga' tu sasalusidan nu tireng. Tuwa tangsatu tu labi i muktepay a tuki, malecapu tu i kakilumaan i makawali a luma'. Anini a labi a malecapu ku mamarengreng a selal, a sewalen nu matuasay pasebanaen tu sasademaken nu marengrengay. Maherek a suwal ku matuasay iri, maru' satu 'amin ku selal tangasa i nikalingad. I kalingadan a dabak, i hararbaran masilsil tu i putal maitala tu palingaday nu papeluway a matuasay. U mamarengrengay hantu a selal, sisatamec 'amin tu busuk sirenget tu papah nu daydam u nisalalapian, mikapet 'amin tu tayu u kakemkeman anu mabekac, anu tu'eman ku mipimelaw. Tuwasaan, initu ku papeluway, palekal a palingatu tu selal a mabekac. U makalikul hantu a tamdaw, u papakarusay tu salikulay a mabekacay, Mikapet tu tukal u diwas, u buhcalay a ma'inayan mihakulung tu selal a mabekac, makalepel tu salikulay a tamdaw, mikemkem tu daidam micupelas tu kulul mikuduc tu banuh nu ayam sipabulsak i kulul nia salikulay. "sakilmelen kapah! tanglalay niama aku han, kasamata!" sa a paceruh . U pakarusay hantu a tamdaw masakilmel a mipadang, maykitin maycekeruh, sulinay tangasatu i kakatangasaan. Saan, masasa'tu 'amin ku namabekacay, satu misuayaw tu cidal a malalikid, lima a raradiwan a misakeru. Tangasa i sabau cacay ku tuki kia misengar , ruyaruy satu 'amin a taluma' a malahuk i luma'. I namalahuk, paremiad satu a malalikid tangasa i sabaw cacay a tuki nu labii a misengar a misakeru. Malecapu aca a mitengil tu suwal nu matuasay, pasebana' tu sademakan nu selal, tuwa hatini tu ku demak tu nu marengrengay a kakawau. Ngangan nu selal: Alabangas : 14-21 a mihcaan (na i 2008 a miselal,saka telucay nu selal anini) Matabuk : 22-29 Ma'urad : 30-37 Ma'ulac : 38-45 Ma'uway : 46-53 Alemet : 54-61 Raraw : 62-69 Alamay : 70-77 Aladiwas : 78-85
S.PHON: == marəŋrəŋ == masasəɾaɾ ato~u~u marəŋrəŋ kaɾo~u~u nijaro~u~u no~u~u paŋʦaħ, ira ʡamin ko~u~u marəŋrəŋ ħananaj a ɾisin. o~u~urasa, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u ʦaajaj kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ a kakawao~u~u no~u~u ɾisin. o~u~u inian niso~u~uwaɾan anini, o~u~u no~u~u natao~u~uran a nijaro~u~uʡ a kakawao~u~u: o~u~u ŋaŋan no~u~u səɾaɾ * siwa a sasəɾaɾan. ano~u~u nao~u~u maan a kapo~u~ut ko~u~u nisasəɾaɾan no~u~u miso~u~u, taŋasa i nikapataj no~u~u tirəŋ, a ʦaaj paʦəɾo~u~uɾ to~u~u ŋaŋan no~u~u səɾaɾ. maʡəɬ~ɮəm a pito~u~u a miħʦa maɾiŋato~u~u aʦa to~u~u sakaro~u~uma a ɾijo~u~ut no~u~u səɾaɾ a marəŋrəŋ. miɾəʦino~u~uwasaj ato~u~u misatataɬ~ɮaj: saʡjawaj a nikaɾa mamisəɾaɾ, naw miɾəʦino~u~uwasaj to~u~u marəŋrəŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u~u maŋaɾaaj a maɾapapəɾo~u~uwaj no~u~u nia səɾaɾ. a ʦaaj ħənaj pakaɬ~ɮo~u~uŋɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ a siɬ~ɮəmak to~u~u no~u~u səɾaɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u~uro~u~uma ħanto~u~u, ira ko~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ɾaɾab~b~vo~u~u no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ, ano~u~u misəɾaɾ, amaanən ħənaj a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ. o~u~u sananaj sisa, miɾəʦino~u~uwas to~u~u nikarəŋrəŋ no~u~uini a kapo~u~ut. o~u~u so~u~uwaɾ to~u~u matiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw o~u~u misataɬ~ɮaj ħan ko~u~u nipaŋaŋan. ano~u~u sataɬ~ɮa so~u~uwaɾən, o~u~u saʡajawaj a maʡaɾa no~u~u inian a səɾaɾ, o~u~u mamisəɾaɾ ħan ko~u~u nipaŋaŋan. ano~u~u taŋasato~u~u i pito~u~uaj a miħʦa, i ajaw no~u~u ʦaʦaj a miħʦa no~u~u piɾisinan, ʦaaj kanʦa piʡaɾa to~u~u mamisəɾaɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u~u miʡaɾa to~u~u mamisəɾaɾ, o~u~u matiɾaaj o~u~u namiɾəʦino~u~uwas a tamɬ~ɮaw, ano~u~u aɾo~u~uman sab~b~vawto~u~usa. aɾamaanan waɾo~u~u a tatamɬ~ɮawan ko~u~u nipapiʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ. sakato~u~usa a nipiʡaɾa to~u~u misəɾaɾaj, o~u~u taŋasaaj no~u~u miħʦa a kapaħ a wawaan. o~u~u miħmiħʦaan i piɾisinan ħaən sa a mitako~u~us to~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taŋsa ini karəŋrəŋan a miħəʦaan ko~u~u nisato~u~uko~u~ur . taŋasa to~u~u i karəŋrəŋan a miħʦaan, maʡɬ~ɮəm ko~u~u pito~u~uʡaj a miħʦaan, siɾaɾamɾam sa ko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ano~u~u aɾo~u~uman. waɾo~u~u a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ siwa a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u rab~b~vas ko~u~u mikiħatijaaj a kapaħ i matia a miħʦa. o~u~urasa, aʦaaj kanʦa ka simiɾəʦino~u~uwasaj i karəŋrəŋan. anini sato~u~u, ʦaajto~u~u ka aɾo~u~uman ko~u~u mikiħatijaaj a misasəɾaɾ. maħrək a miɾisin i sakamo~u~uktəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ, a maɾiŋato~u~u to~u~uwaj a səmamsam a pakasaw to~u~u mamarəŋrəŋ a səɾaɾ. o~u~u kakawao~u~u ħanto~u~u no~u~u nipakasaw iri. saʡjawaj a mo~u~ukʡtəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ - ʦaʦaj a kajsiŋ ko~u~u nipiɾo~u~uwan a kəman to~u~u ranam to~u~u ɾaħo~u~uk to~u~u ɾab~b~vi. sakato~u~usa a mo~u~ukʡtəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ - to~u~usa a kajsin ko~u~u nipiɾo~u~uwan to~u~u ni kakəman. sakato~u~uɾo~u~u a mo~u~ukʡtəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ - ħani ka ʦaʦajən to~u~u kakəman. o~u~u aʡam sato~u~u ato~u~u nano~u~um, ini kaw kaɾiŋato~u~uwan a səmamsam. o~u~u ɬ~ɮab~b~vak ato~u~u saŋsaŋɬ~ɮəb~b~v, i o~u~umaʡo~u~umaħan, i taɾo~u~uan a minanam a maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ, paɾəʦaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u~u ko~u~uko~u~uʡ to~u~u kamaj a misakəro~u~u, o~u~u raɬ~ɮiw ko~u~u ro~u~uma. ano~u~u ʦima ko~u~u ʦaajaj pitəŋiɾ a tamɬ~ɮaw, taʡəsəŋ no~u~u misatataɬ~ɮaj, o~u~u nikasib~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uj ko~u~u ro~u~uma a məɾawan. aɾamaʡanan minanam a marəŋrəŋ misatatirəb~b~vo~u~uɬ~ɮan ko~u~u ro~u~uma, ʦaʦaj a sasəɾaɾan awaaj ko~u~u misiwatiɬ~ɮaj to~u~u ko~u~upo~u~ut. saɾiko~u~uɾaj a mo~u~ukʡtəp a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ - miɾao~u~up i amis, o~u~u əmin no~u~u səɾaɾ a miɾaɾab~b~va to~u~u ajam, ko~u~uɾijo~u~uɾ. awaaj ko~u~u nikapətan to~u~u ɾakaw to~u~u maamaan aʦa, waɾsaj sa. ano~u~u mapataj ko~u~u niɾəpəɾan iri, o~u~u saraʡəʦo~u~usaj a kakawao~u~u. aranikaj a mapataj kia tamɬ~ɮaw naw makaɾəpəɾaj sa ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uasaj. maħrək sato~u~u taɾo~u~umaʡ, paɾəʦapo~u~uən kia niɾəpəɾan, sipab~b~vəɾi i mato~u~uasaj sa to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uħən sipakaən to~u~u papəɾo~u~uwaj. to~u~uwa mib~b~vətik pakaro~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ. sapaka to~u~uɾo~u~u a rəmiaɬ~ɮ, miɾao~u~up aʦa itimo~u~uɾ, ano~u~u awaaj ko~u~u mapatajai no~u~u niɾəpəɾan nija səɾaɾ iri, o~u~uro~u~uma ko~u~u o~u~uɾaħ no~u~u səɾaɾ, no~u~u mato~u~uasaj, o~u~u maɾəməɬ~ɮaj sa ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ. o~u~uro~u~uma ħanto~u~u, ira o~u~u mab~b~vanaaj a papəɾo~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw tato~u~uɾo~u~u, sasəpat to~u~uwa maħko~u~uɾo~u~uŋ a tajra i paɾəɾo~u~uwaj a mato~u~uasat, mitəŋiɾ minanam to~u~u sapapəɾo~u~u, mipaɾita aʦa to~u~u sasaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan no~u~u səɾaɾ. aɾamaanan pakasəmo~u~uwaɾən no~u~u mato~u~uasaj, papinanam a papəɾo~u~u. itini inika səmamsam a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u~u ɬ~ɮab~b~vak, saŋsaŋɬ~ɮəb~b~v ʦaaj kanʦa pinanam a misakəro~u~u, mab~b~vəkaʦ, rəmaɬ~ɮiw papəɾo~u~u awaaj ko~u~u misiwatiɬ~ɮaj. to~u~uwa taŋasato~u~u i sakato~u~uɾo~u~u a po~u~uɾo~u~uʡ ira ko~u~u siwa a rəmiʡaɬ~ɮ, paħanħan. miraso~u~ur to~u~u mamisaŋaʡ to~u~u sasaɾo~u~usiɬ~ɮan no~u~u tirəŋ. to~u~uwa taŋsato~u~u to~u~u ɾab~b~vi i mo~u~uktəpaj a to~u~uki, maɾəʦapo~u~u to~u~u i kakiɾo~u~umaan i makawaɾi a ɾo~u~umaʡ. anini a ɾab~b~vi a maɾəʦapo~u~u ko~u~u mamarəŋrəŋ a səɾaɾ, a səwaɾən no~u~u mato~u~uasaj pasəb~b~vanaən to~u~u sasaɬ~ɮəmakən no~u~u marəŋrəŋaj. maħərək a so~u~uwaɾ ko~u~u mato~u~uasaj iri, maro~u~uʡ sato~u~u ʡamin ko~u~u səɾaɾ taŋasa i nikaɾiŋaɬ~ɮ. i kaɾiŋaɬ~ɮan a ɬ~ɮab~b~vak, i ħararb~b~varan masiɾsiɾ to~u~u i po~u~utaɾ maitaɾa to~u~u paɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj no~u~u papəɾo~u~uwaj a mato~u~uasaj. o~u~u mamarəŋrəŋaj ħanto~u~u a səɾaɾ, sisataməʦ ʡamin to~u~u b~b~vo~u~uso~u~uk sirəŋət to~u~u papaħ no~u~u ɬ~ɮajɬ~ɮam o~u~u nisaɾaɾapian, mikapət ʡamin to~u~u tajo~u~u o~u~u kakəmkəman ano~u~u mab~b~vəkaʦ, ano~u~u to~u~uʡəman ko~u~u mipiməɾaw. to~u~uwasaan, inito~u~u ko~u~u papəɾo~u~uwaj, paɾəkaɾ a paɾiŋato~u~u to~u~u səɾaɾ a mab~b~vəkaʦ. o~u~u makaɾiko~u~uɾ ħanto~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u~u papakaro~u~usaj to~u~u saɾiko~u~uɾaj a mab~b~vəkaʦaj, mikapət to~u~u to~u~ukaɾ o~u~u ɬ~ɮiwas, o~u~u b~b~vo~u~uħʦaɾaj a maʡinajan miħako~u~uɾo~u~uŋ to~u~u səɾaɾ a mab~b~vəkaʦ, makaɾəpəɾ to~u~u saɾiko~u~uɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, mikəmkəm to~u~u ɬ~ɮaiɬ~ɮam miʦo~u~upəɾas to~u~u ko~u~uɾo~u~uɾ miko~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uʦ to~u~u b~b~vano~u~uħ no~u~u ajam sipab~b~vo~u~uɾsak i ko~u~uɾo~u~uɾ nia saɾiko~u~uɾaj. "sakiɾməɾən kapaħ! taŋɾaɾaj niama ako~u~u ħan, kasamata!" sa a paʦəro~u~uħ . o~u~u pakaro~u~usaj ħanto~u~u a tamɬ~ɮaw masakiɾməɾ a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ, majkitin majʦəkəro~u~uħ, so~u~uɾinaj taŋasato~u~u i kakataŋasaan. saan, masasaʡto~u~u ʡamin ko~u~u namab~b~vəkaʦaj, sato~u~u miso~u~uajaw to~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ a maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ, ɾima a raraɬ~ɮiwan a misakəro~u~u. taŋasa i sab~b~vao~u~u ʦaʦaj ko~u~u to~u~uki kia misəŋar , ro~u~ujaro~u~uj sato~u~u ʡamin a taɾo~u~umaʡ a maɾaħo~u~uk i ɾo~u~umaʡ. i namaɾaħo~u~uk, parəmiaɬ~ɮ sato~u~u a maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ taŋasa i sab~b~vaw ʦaʦaj a to~u~uki no~u~u ɾab~b~vii a misəŋar a misakəro~u~u. maɾəʦapo~u~u aʦa a mitəŋiɾ to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uasaj, pasəb~b~vanaʡ to~u~u saɬ~ɮəmakan no~u~u səɾaɾ, to~u~uwa ħatini to~u~u ko~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak to~u~u no~u~u marəŋrəŋaj a kakawao~u~u. ŋaŋan no~u~u səɾaɾ: aɾab~b~vaŋas : **-** a miħʦaan (na i **** a misəɾaɾ,saka təɾo~u~uʦaj no~u~u səɾaɾ anini) matab~b~vo~u~uk : **-** maʡo~u~uraɬ~ɮ : **-** maʡo~u~uɾaʦ : **-** maʡo~u~uwaj : **-** aɾəmət : **-** raraw : **-** aɾamaj : **-** aɾaɬ~ɮiwas : **-**
